mapper.sql: id, `name`, `password`, salt, gender, birthday, phone, email, picture, `position`, company, home_page, org_id, `state`, auth_id, auth_source, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from pp_user
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from pp_user
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into pp_user (`name`, `password`, salt, gender, birthday, phone, email, picture, `position`, company, home_page, org_id, `state`, auth_id, auth_source, create_time, update_time, intro ) values (#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{salt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{birthday,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{picture,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{position,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{homePage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orgId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{state,jdbcType=BIT}, #{authId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{authSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{intro,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} )

`name`,
`password`,
salt,
gender,
birthday,
phone,
email,
picture,

company,

org_id,

mapper.update:
update pp_user
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
`name` = #{record.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`password` = #{record.password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salt = #{record.salt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gender = #{record.gender,jdbcType=TINYINT},
birthday = #{record.birthday,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{record.phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{record.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
picture = #{record.picture,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`position` = #{record.position,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
company = #{record.company,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
home_page = #{record.homePage,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
org_id = #{record.orgId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
`state` = #{record.state,jdbcType=BIT},
auth_id = #{record.authId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
auth_source = #{record.authSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
intro = #{record.intro,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update pp_user set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, `name` = #{record.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `password` = #{record.password,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, salt = #{record.salt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gender = #{record.gender,jdbcType=TINYINT}, birthday = #{record.birthday,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{record.phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{record.email,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, picture = #{record.picture,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `position` = #{record.position,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, company = #{record.company,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, home_page = #{record.homePage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, org_id = #{record.orgId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, `state` = #{record.state,jdbcType=BIT}, auth_id = #{record.authId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, auth_source = #{record.authSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, intro = #{record.intro,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}

update pp_user
`name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`password` = #{password,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
salt = #{salt,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
gender = #{gender,jdbcType=TINYINT},
birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone = #{phone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
email = #{email,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
picture = #{picture,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

auth_source = #{authSource,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
intro = #{intro,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
